---
title: "first post"
description: "my first post"
author: "Eric Allatta"
date: "3/18/2026"
categories:
  - learning
  - setup
  - analysis
---

# Embarking
This learning blog marks a beginning. Something of a formal step toward transitioning to a new career. My experience as a NYC computer science teacher and school spreadsheet builder has given me a foundation in institutional education and computing. I seek to build on the combined foundation toward education data systems and analysis. My hope is to find sustainability in a career that calls upon me as a problem solver, communicator, and mathematician.
